wiki.summary: "How To Teleport" is a song by the American musician Jane Remover. It was released by DeadAir Records on September 4, 2024, along with its A-side "Magic I Want U". It was written, performed, and mixed by Remover. "How to Teleport" is a glitch pop song with drum programming that is reminiscent of Chicago footwork, and is about feeling lost and hopeless. Read more on Last.fm.
